dialog.title: Change subscription plan
dialog.description: Compare tiers and upgrade or downgrade your plan when your needs change.
dialog.freeFootnote: Free workspaces may pause after inactivity. Limit of 2 active workspaces on Free.

upgradeDialog.title: Upgrade to {{plan}}
upgradeDialog.description: Simulated checkout for the standalone demo. No card is charged.
upgradeDialog.terms: By upgrading, you agree to the organizational Terms of Service. Billed securely via our payment partner.

downgradeDialog.title: Downgrade to {{plan}}
downgradeDialog.description: Your plan changes immediately in this demo. Seat limits and features update right away.
downgradeDialog.bulletFeatures: You may lose access to features not included on {{plan}} (for example SSO or audit logs on Team).
downgradeDialog.bulletSeats: Active and invited members still count toward the new seat limit.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For small teams shipping to production.

team.name: Team
team.description: For organizations that need SSO and scale.

trialing.messageNoEnd: You are on a trial. Add a payment method to avoid interruption.
trialing.messageOneDay: You are on a trial. Trial ends in {{days}} day. Add a payment method to avoid interruption.
trialing.messageDays: You are on a trial. Trial ends in {{days}} days. Add a payment method to avoid interruption.

past_due.message: Your last payment failed. Update billing details to restore full access.

incomplete.message: Action required to activate your subscription.

unpaid.message: This workspace is suspended due to unpaid invoices.

canceled.messageEnded: Your subscription has ended. Reactivate to regain access.

errors.downgradeSeats: You have {{used}} members but {{plan}} allows {{limit}}. Remove members before downgrading.
errors.portalUnavailable: Could not open the billing portal. Try again from Billing settings.
errors.checkoutUnavailable: Could not start checkout. Try again in a moment.
